cards.title: Entities, Predicates, and Joins
cards.governance_note: Define entities, predicates, keys, join logic, cardinality, and relationship assumptions.

cards.title: Missingness and Anti-Joins
cards.governance_note: Use anti-joins and missingness policies to surface absent references, provenance, approvals, and audit events.

cards.title: Query Governance
cards.governance_note: Preserve query versions, parameters, access reviews, provenance links, aggregation definitions, and interpretation notes.
